name: Darley Dale and Winster

locations.name: Matlock
locations.address:
Matlock Enquiry Office,
Bank Road,
Matlock,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Darley Dale and Winster. It belongs to the Derbyshire Dales Local Policing Unit. Darley Dale, approximately two miles north of Matlock, is at the heart of this neighbourhood which also extends to cover the nearby villages of South Darley, Wensley, Oker and Two Dales as well as the Matlock districts of Farley and Hackney. It also covers the village of Winster.
